perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title screen featuring the Costco logo and a cartoon avatar of a man, indicating a weekly discount report. (2) It then transitions into a very rapid montage of various products inside a Costco warehouse, including household goods like toilet paper, fresh meats, snacks, electronics like fans, and frozen foods. Each shot focuses on the product packaging on shelves or in coolers. (3) The creator, a male, appears briefly in the beginning and at the end of the video with animated expressions to frame the content.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking immediately in an energetic, high-pitched, and promotional tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) High-tempo, upbeat electronic background music starts at the beginning and continues throughout the video. (3) The narration is a non-stop, fast-paced listing of product names and prices, perfectly synced with the visual cuts. No significant ambient noise or sound effects are detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: 'Costco Weekly Discount Report 05/12~05/18' and 'Remember to follow us'. (2) Functional text appears on every product shot: The product name in Chinese (e.g., 'Mayflower Toilet Paper'), the original price, the discount amount (e.g., '-70'), and the final special price (e.g., '279'). (3) The tone of the text is informative and urgent, emphasizing the savings.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator seen in the intro and outro.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male influencer with a casual appearance, using expressive facial gestures.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse store, featuring high industrial shelving, bulk pallet displays, and large refrigerated sections.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire shopping guide to inform viewers about the current weekly discounts available at Costco stores in Taiwan. By showcasing the specific products and their price reductions in a high-energy format, it aims to drive immediate store visits and encourage viewers to follow the creator for future deal updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of store discounts and specific brand promotions within a retail environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced narration combined with a consistent graphic template for pricing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is highly optimized for short-form social media platforms, focusing on utility and high informational density to maintain viewer attention.
